title: verbascum × obornyi
intro: Verbascum × obornyi, also known as the Golden Glow or Oborn's mullein, is a hybrid species of flowering plant in the figwort family (Scrophulariaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to soothe and calm respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular natural remedy for various health conditions. In herbal preparations, Verbascum × obornyi is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, and its dried leaves can be added to smoking blends for their calming effects.
